title: Isolation and Extraction of Plant Nuclei in Plug
author: Karine Labadie
materials: Prepare the wash solutions : TE 10:50 (Wash Buffer) TE 10:5 (For Rnase)
Put a CHEF Disposable Plug Molds on ice CHEF Disposable Plug Molds Bio-Rad Laboratories Catalog ##1703713

Screw a sieve caps onto the tube and empty the solution. Change the proteinase K Solution bath as before. Incubate in thermomixer overnight at 50 °C with intermittent mixing Mixing cycle : 10 seconds at 450 rpm followed by 10 minutes at 0 rpm Overnight 50 °C

Empty the tube using a vent cap. Nunc™ Cell Factory™ System Accessories, vent cap Thermo Fisher Catalog #146008 Rinse the plugs 3 times with 10ml of wash buffer. Wash 2 times with 10ml wash buffer for 15 min at RT with gentle agitation (15 rpm) on a horizontal platform mixer. 15 rpm, Room temperature, 15 minutes

steps.title: NIB Buffer
steps.instruction: NIB Buffer : 200 ml : freshly prepared Reagent Final concentration 1 Tris ph8 10 mM 2 EDTA 10 mM 3 KCl 80 mM 4 Sucrose 0.5 M 5 PVP 40 2 % 6 Spermine 1 mM 7 Spermidine 1 mM 8 H2O qsp 200 ml Adjust the Ph to 9.4 then filter at 0.22 µm

steps.title: NIBT Buffer
steps.instruction: NIBT Buffer : 160 ml A B 1 NIB Buffer 160 ml 2 Triton X100 0.5%

steps.title: NIBTM Buffer
steps.instruction: NIBTM Buffer : 40 ml A B 1 NIBT Buffer 40 ml 2 2-Mercaptoethanol 0.75 %

steps.title: Lysis Buffer
steps.instruction: Lysis Buffer : Can be stored for 1 year at RT. A B 1 EDTA 0.5M 100 ml 2 N-Lauroylsarcosine 1 %

steps.title: Putting a mortar in ice Cool...
steps.instruction: Putting a mortar in ice Cool a mortar/pestle with liquid nitrogen until the bubbling stops.

steps.title: Grind 2g of frozen sample for...
steps.instruction: Grind 2g of frozen sample for without adding liquid nitrogen, until a fine powder is obtained (approx. 2 min) 2 g 00:02:00 Before grinding After grinding

steps.title: Place a beaker in ice and add a magnetic stirrer
steps.instruction: Place a beaker in ice and add a magnetic stirrer. Add 20 ml of NIBTM (10 ml/g of leaves) and stir gently 20 mL, NIBTM

steps.title: Transfer the powder to the beaker...
steps.instruction: Transfer the powder to the beaker and shake gently for 10 minutes in ice. 00:10:00

steps.title: Cell suspension Buffer
steps.instruction: Cell suspension Buffer : Can be stored for 1 year at 4°C. A B 1 Tris ph8 10 mM 2 EDTA 50 mM 3 NaCl 2 mM 4 H2O Qsp 100ml

steps.title: Filter the mixture into a 50ml...
steps.instruction: Filter the mixture into a 50ml tube through autoclaved filters (2 cheese cloth + 2 Mira cloth) on a funnel (squeeze the filters at the end of filtration to recover more of the solution containing the nuclei). Filter through a 40µm cell stariner into a new 50ml tube. Certified Cheesecloth Thermo Fisher Catalog #22055053 Miracloth Merck Millipore (EMD Millipore) Catalog #475855 Falcon 40 µm Cell Strainer Corning Catalog #352340

steps.title: Pelleting the homogenate by centrifugation
steps.instruction: Pelleting the homogenate by centrifugation.(acceleration and deceleration at level 3) 800 x g, 4 °C, 20 minutes, Acc 3 / Dec 3

steps.title: Remove the supernatant and gently resuspend...
steps.instruction: Remove the supernatant and gently resuspend the pellet in ice (use a brush if the pellet does not recover). Add 20ml of cold NIBTM 20 mL, NIBTM

steps.title: Pelleting the homogenate by centrifugation to...
steps.instruction: Pelleting the homogenate by centrifugation to remove residues and unlysed cells. 60 x g, 4 °C, 2 minutes, Acc 3 / Dec 3

steps.title: Filter the supernatant through a 40...
steps.instruction: Filter the supernatant through a 40 µm cell sieve into a new 50 ml tube.

steps.title: Pellet the nuclei by centrifugation
steps.instruction: Pellet the nuclei by centrifugation. 800 x g, 4 °C, 15 minutes, Acc 3 / Dec 3

steps.title: Wash the pellet 3 times in NIBT buffer
steps.instruction: Wash the pellet 3 times in NIBT buffer : - Remove the supernatant - Gently resuspend the pellet - Add 40 ml of cold NIBT buffer 40 mL, NIBT - Centrifuge 800 x g, 4 °C, 15 minutes, Acc 3 / Dec 3 1st wash 2nd wash 3rd wash

steps.title: Make a final wash in 30...
steps.instruction: Make a final wash in 30 ml of cold NIB buffer. 800 x g, 4 °C, 15 minutes, Acc 3 / Dec 3 Final wash

steps.title: Resuspend the last pellet in the residual buffer (approx
steps.instruction: Resuspend the last pellet in the residual buffer (approx. 200 µl) and transfer the homogenate to a 1.5 ml tube. Centrifuge. 800 x g, 4 °C, 15 minutes, Acc3 / Dec 3

steps.title: Remove the supernatant with a pipette...
steps.instruction: Remove the supernatant with a pipette and resuspend the pellet in an appropriate volume of cell suspension buffer : 60µl / plug Adjust the number of plugs to be made according to the size of the pellet.

steps.title: Use Low Melting agarose for a...
steps.instruction: Use Low Melting agarose for a final agarose concentration of 0.8 % UltraPure™ Low Melting Point Agarose Contributed by users Catalog #16520-100

steps.title: Melt agarose at 70°C for 5...
steps.instruction: Melt agarose at 70°C for 5 min then equilibrate at 43°C for 5 min 00:05:00 70 °C 00:05:00 43 °C

steps.title: Preheat the nuclei suspension to 43°C...
steps.instruction: Preheat the nuclei suspension to 43°C for 3min and then add the appropriate amount of 2% agarose (see table). Mix gently with a wide-bore tip, avoiding bubbles. 00:03:00 43 °C

steps.title: Immediately dispense 100µl of mixture per well using wide-bore tips
steps.instruction: Immediately dispense 100µl of mixture per well using wide-bore tips. Allow to polymerise for 15 minutes on ice. 00:15:00 On ice

steps.title: Prepare a fresh proteinase K digestion...
steps.instruction: Prepare a fresh proteinase K digestion solution by mixing 200 μl of proteinase K enzyme (20mg/ml) with 2.5 ml of lysis buffer in a 50 ml tube. 200 µL, Prot. K 2.5 mL, Lysis Buffer

steps.title: Transfer plugs to the 50ml tube...
steps.instruction: Transfer plugs to the 50ml tube containing Proteinase K digestion solution.

steps.title: Incubate in thermomixer for 2 hours...
steps.instruction: Incubate in thermomixer for 2 hours at 50 °C with intermittent mixing Mixing cycle : 10 seconds at 450 rpm followed by 10 minutes at 0 rpm 02:00:00 50 °C

steps.title: Rinse the plugs 3 times with...
steps.instruction: Rinse the plugs 3 times with 10ml of TE 10:5 Add 2.5ml of TE 10:5 and 50 µl of Rnase Solution RNase A Qiagen Catalog #19101 Incubate 1hour at 37°C with intermittent mixing 01:00:00 37 °C

steps.title: Rinse the plugs 3 times with 10ml of Wash Buffer
steps.instruction: Rinse the plugs 3 times with 10ml of Wash Buffer. NB : The plugs can be stored at 4°C in a wash buffer at this stage

steps.title: Wash 4 times with 10ml wash...
steps.instruction: Wash 4 times with 10ml wash buffer for 15 min at RT with gentle agitation (15 rpm) on a horizontal platform mixer. 15 rpm, Room temperature, 15 minutes

steps.title: Transfer the plug to a 1
steps.instruction: Transfer the plug to a 1.5 ml tube with a sterile spatula

steps.title: Melt the plug in a water...
steps.instruction: Melt the plug in a water bath at 70°C for 2 minutes 00:02:00 70 °C

steps.title: Transfer the tube to a water...
steps.instruction: Transfer the tube to a water bath at 43°C for 5 minutes 00:05:00 43 °C

steps.title: Add 2µl of agarase and mix...
steps.instruction: Add 2µl of agarase and mix gently by rotating with the tip. Incubate 45 minutes at 43 °C 00:45:00 43 °C

steps.title: Place 10 ml of 1x TE...
steps.instruction: Place 10 ml of 1x TE Buffer in a 6 cm Petri dish. Float a 0.1 μm dialysis membrane on the surface of the 1x TE Buffer. Place a cover on the Petri dish and let the membrane equilibrates for 15 minutes. 00:15:00

steps.title: Deposit the entire sample in the...
steps.instruction: Deposit the entire sample in the centre of the membrane using a wide-bore tip. Place cover on the Petri dish and let the sample dialyze for 45 minutes at room temperature. 00:45:00 Room temperature

steps.title: Transfer DNA to a 1
steps.instruction: Transfer DNA to a 1.5 ml microfuge tube with a Wide Bore Tip.

steps.title: Allow the DNA to resuspend overnight...
steps.instruction: Allow the DNA to resuspend overnight at RT then 2 days at 4°C before performing quality control. Overnight Room temperature

steps.title: Quantify your sample with a Qubit HS . NB
steps.instruction: Quantify your sample with a Qubit HS . NB : Before quantification, sonicate the DNA aliquot for 10 min to obtain a more reliable result Visualise 1 µL of sample to estimate the molecular weight. ( Tapestation or/and pipin pulse or/and Femto pulse )

steps.title: QC results obtained on different plant...
steps.instruction: QC results obtained on different plant species, using different technologies to estimate the size of the molecules.

steps.title: optional
steps.instruction: optional : microscopic observation - Take an aliquot of 100 µl of suspension - Stain with DAPI - Observe the presence of nuclei
